Title: Register a new user with valid details
Preconditions: Application is accessible; User is not logged in; Test email is not already registered
Test Data: Name: Auto-generated valid name; Email: Auto-generated unique email; Other fields: Valid data for all mandatory fields
Test Steps: 1. Launch the browser 2. Navigate to the home page 3. Verify the home page is displayed 4. Click on the Signup / Login button 5. Verify 'New User Signup!' section is visible 6. Enter a valid name and email address 7. Click the Signup button 8. Verify 'ENTER ACCOUNT INFORMATION' page is displayed 9. Fill all required account details 10. Click Create Account 11. Verify 'ACCOUNT CREATED!' message 12. Click Continue 13. Verify the user is logged in and username is displayed 14. Click Delete Account 15. Verify 'ACCOUNT DELETED!' message 16. Click Continue
Expected Result: User is successfully registered

Title: Register user using an already registered email
Preconditions: Email address is already registered in the system
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the home page 2. Click Signup / Login 3. Enter a valid name and an already registered email 4. Click Signup
Expected Result: Error message 'Email Address already exist!' is displayed; User is not allowed to proceed with registration

Title: Verify all signup and account information fields are visible
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the home page 2. Click Signup / Login 3. Verify 'New User Signup!' section is visible 4. Enter valid name and email 5. Click Signup 6. Verify 'ENTER ACCOUNT INFORMATION' page is displayed 7. Verify the presence of the following fields: Title (Mr), Password, First Name, Last Name, Address, Country dropdown
Expected Result: All required signup and account information fields are visible and enabled

Title: Register user using special characters in name field
Preconditions: Application is accessible; Email is not already registered
Test Data: Name: Test@User#123; Email: Auto-generated unique email
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the home page 2. Click Signup / Login 3. Enter name with special characters and valid email 4. Click Signup 5. Verify 'ENTER ACCOUNT INFORMATION' page is displayed 6. Fill all required details 7. Click Create Account 8. Click Continue after account creation 9. Delete the account
Expected Result: System accepts the name with special characters; User is registered successfully and can delete the account

Title: Login user with correct email and password
Preconditions: Application is accessible; A valid user account exists
Test Data: Email: Registered user email; Password: Correct password
Test Steps: 1. Launch the browser 2. Navigate to the home page 3. Verify the home page is displayed 4. Click on Signup / Login 5. Verify 'Login to your account' section is visible 6. Enter a valid email address 7. Enter the correct password 8. Click the Login button
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully; Logged-in username is displayed on the home page

Title: Login user with incorrect email and password
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the home page 2. Click Signup / Login 3. Verify 'Login to your account' section is visible 4. Enter an invalid email address 5. Enter an incorrect password 6. Click the Login button
Expected Result: Login fails; Error message 'Your email or password is incorrect!' is displayed; User remains on the login page

Title: Verify user can log out successfully
Test Steps: 1. Ensure the user is logged in 2. Click the Logout button 3. Observe the navigation
Expected Result: User is logged out successfully; User is redirected to the Login page; Login form is visible

Title: Verify presence of login form fields
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the home page 2. Click Signup / Login 3. Observe the login section
Expected Result: The following elements are visible: Email input field, Password input field, Login button; Fields are enabled and ready for input

Title: Verify login is prevented with empty credentials
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the home page 2. Click Signup / Login 3. Leave email and password fields empty 4. Click the Login button
Expected Result: Login does not proceed; User remains on the login page; Validation prevents submission (inline validation or no action)

Title: Verify login session is maintained across navigation
Test Steps: 1. Login with valid credentials 2. Navigate to another page (e.g., Products page) 3. Navigate back to the Home page
Expected Result: User remains logged in; Username is still displayed; No re-login is required

Title: Add multiple products to cart
Preconditions: Application is accessible; User is not required to be logged in
Test Steps: 1. Launch the browser 2. Navigate to the home page 3. Click on Products 4. Hover over the first product 5. Click Add to Cart 6. Click Continue Shopping 7. Hover over the second product 8. Click Add to Cart 9. Click View Cart
Expected Result: Cart page is displayed; Both products are added to the cart; Each product shows: Correct price, Correct quantity, Correct total price per product

Title: Verify product quantity is updated correctly in cart
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the home page 2. Click on Products 3. Click View Product for any product 4. Verify the product detail page is opened 5. Increase product quantity to 4 6. Click Add to Cart 7. Click View Cart
Expected Result: Cart page is displayed; Selected product quantity is shown as 4

Title: Remove a product from the shopping cart
Preconditions: Cart contains at least one product
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the home page 2. Click on Products 3. Add any product to the cart 4. Click Cart 5. Verify cart page is displayed 6. Click the X / Remove button for the product
Expected Result: Product is removed from the cart; Cart item count is reduced by one

Title: Verify cart retains products after user login
Preconditions: User is not logged in; Cart contains at least one product
Test Steps: 1. Add a product to the cart 2. Click Cart 3. Verify cart page is displayed 4. Click Proceed to Checkout 5. Click Register / Login 6. Complete user registration 7. Navigate back to the cart
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully; Cart still contains previously added products

Title: Verify empty cart message is displayed
Preconditions: No products are added to the cart
Test Steps: 1. Navigate directly to the cart page
Expected Result: Empty cart message is displayed OR No products are listed in the cart

Title: Verify subscription functionality on cart page
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the cart page 2. Scroll down to the footer 3. Verify SUBSCRIPTION section is visible 4. Enter a valid email address 5. Click the subscription arrow button
Expected Result: Subscription success message is displayed

Title: Verify total price calculation in cart
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the home page 2. Click on Products 3. Add two or more products to the cart 4. Click Cart
Expected Result: Cart page is displayed; Total price equals the sum of individual product totals; Total price is greater than zero

Title: Verify cart page UI loads correctly
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the cart page
Expected Result: Cart page loads without errors; Product list section is visible; Quantity, price, and remove options are displayed correctly

Title: Verify all products listing and product detail page
Test Steps: 1. Launch the browser 2. Navigate to the home page 3. Click on the Products button 4. Verify user is navigated to the ALL PRODUCTS page 5. Verify the products list is displayed 6. Click View Product for the first product 7. Verify user is navigated to the product detail page 8. Verify the following product details are visible: Product name, Category, Price, Availability, Condition, Brand
Expected Result: ALL PRODUCTS page loads successfully; Product list is visible with at least one product; Product detail page displays all required product information

Title: Search product using valid search term
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the home page 2. Click on Products 3. Verify ALL PRODUCTS page is displayed 4. Enter a valid product name in the search input 5. Click the Search button
Expected Result: SEARCHED PRODUCTS section is displayed; All displayed products are relevant to the search keyword; At least one product is shown in the search results

Title: Search product with non-existent keyword
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the home page 2. Click on Products 3. Enter a non-existent product name in the search field 4. Click the Search button
Expected Result: SEARCHED PRODUCTS section is displayed; Either: No products are shown or A 'No products found' style message is displayed; Application does not crash or misbehave

Title: Verify product quantity can be increased on product detail page
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the home page 2. Click on Products 3. Click View Product for any product 4. Verify the quantity input field is visible 5. Set the product quantity to 4
Expected Result: Quantity field accepts numeric input; Quantity value is updated correctly to 4

Title: View products filtered by category
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the home page 2. Verify product categories are visible on the left sidebar 3. Click on Women category 4. Click on Dress sub-category
Expected Result: User is navigated to the category products page; URL reflects category filtering; Products related to the selected category are displayed

Title: View products filtered by brand
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the home page 2. Click on Products 3. Verify brands list is visible on the left sidebar 4. Click on any brand (e.g., Polo)
Expected Result: User is navigated to the brand products page; URL reflects brand filtering; Products belonging to the selected brand are displayed

Title: Add multiple products to cart from products page
Preconditions: Application is accessible; Cart is empty or has space for new items
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the home page 2. Click on Products 3. Add the first product to the cart 4. Click Continue Shopping 5. Add the second product to the cart 6. Click View Cart
Expected Result: Cart page is displayed; Exactly two products are present in the cart

Title: Search with Empty Search Term
Test Steps: 1. Open the home page 2. Click on Products 3. Leave the search field empty 4. Click the Search button
Expected Result: Search results page is displayed; Application does not crash; Either all products or a valid empty result view is shown

Title: Search with Special Characters
Test Steps: 1. Enter special characters in the search field 2. Click Search
Expected Result: Search executes without errors; Page does not break; Results page is displayed safely (no script execution)

Title: Search with Very Long Input
Test Steps: 1. Enter a very long string in the search field 2. Click Search
Expected Result: Application remains stable; Search results page loads correctly

Title: Search Case Sensitivity
Test Steps: 1. Search using each variation 2. Observe results
Expected Result: Search works for all case variations; No errors occur; Results are consistent or logically similar

Title: Multiple Rapid Searches
Test Steps: 1. Perform consecutive searches quickly (top, dress, jeans, etc.)
Expected Result: Application handles rapid input; Search results load each time without UI freeze or crash

Title: Search Using Numeric Values
Test Steps: 1. Enter numeric value in search field 2. Click Search
Expected Result: Search executes gracefully; Results page is displayed

Title: Partial Product Name Search
Test Steps: 1. Enter partial product names 2. Click Search
Expected Result: Matching products are displayed; Search does not fail for partial input

Title: Add Product to Cart with Zero Quantity
Preconditions: User is on Product Detail page
Test Steps: 1. Set product quantity to 0 2. Click Add to Cart
Expected Result: System prevents adding zero quantity OR System handles it gracefully without crashing

Title: Navigate to Cart When Empty
Test Steps: 1. Navigate directly to Cart page
Expected Result: Cart page loads successfully; Empty cart message is displayed

Title: Click Non-Existent Category
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to select a category that does not exist
Expected Result: Application handles error gracefully; No crash or broken UI

Title: Subscribe with Invalid Email Formats
Test Steps: 1. Scroll to footer 2. Enter invalid email 3. Click Subscribe
Expected Result: Invalid email is rejected OR Error message is displayed; Application remains stable

Title: Double Click Add to Cart Button
Preconditions: Product is visible on Home page
Test Steps: 1. Double-click Add to Cart quickly 2. Navigate to Cart
Expected Result: Cart quantity is handled correctly (no duplication bugs); Application does not crash

Title: Page Refresh During Search Operation
Test Steps: 1. Start a product search 2. Refresh the page immediately
Expected Result: Page reloads successfully; Products page is displayed correctly after refresh
